items.title: Storms Knock Out Warren Power Lines, Fueling Data Center Ban Push
items.dek: Council may impose a temporary moratorium after July outages exposed strain on the aging grid with no zoning rules in place for the power-hungry facilities.
items.judge_note: New development in Warren—council considering moratorium triggered by specific July outage events, distinct from other municipalities' actions.

items.title: Lenox Residents Push Recall After Emails Reveal Secret Data Center Pitch
items.dek: Township officials in rural Michigan were contacted privately by developers; residents now face higher energy and water bills if the project advances.
items.judge_note: New development in Lenox with concrete action (recall push) and document evidence (revealed emails) — different township, specific new event.
